panels.title: Cook temperature (live)
panels.description: Latest cook-unit temp_C. Setpoint 88 C for chocolate-vla-1L.

targets.sql: SELECT LAST(value) AS temp_C FROM idp.telemetry WHERE topic = 'DairyWorks/Vla/Cook/cook-unit-01/Status/temp_C'

panels.title: End viscosity (live)
panels.description: Latest viscosity_cP. Spec 150-300 cP. Below 150 = under spec = Solve trigger.

targets.sql: SELECT LAST(value) AS viscosity_cP FROM idp.telemetry WHERE topic = 'DairyWorks/Vla/Cook/cook-unit-01/Status/viscosity_cP'
SELECT LAST(value) AS packs FROM idp.telemetry WHERE topic = 'DairyWorks/Vla/Filling/filler-01/Status/packs_total'
SELECT LAST(valuestr) AS state FROM idp.telemetry WHERE topic = 'DairyWorks/Vla/Batch/Status/state'

panels.title: Cook temperature over time
panels.description: cook-unit-01 temp_C vs setpoint_C. Fault cook_undertemp caps the peak (under-cook).

targets.sql: SELECT _wstart AS ts, AVG(value) AS temp_C FROM idp.telemetry WHERE topic = 'DairyWorks/Vla/Cook/cook-unit-01/Status/temp_C' AND ts >= $from AND ts <= $to INTERVAL($interval) FILL(PREV)
SELECT _wstart AS ts, AVG(value) AS setpoint_C FROM idp.telemetry WHERE topic = 'DairyWorks/Vla/Cook/cook-unit-01/Status/setpoint_C' AND ts >= $from AND ts <= $to INTERVAL($interval) FILL(PREV)

panels.title: Viscosity over time (the Solve)
panels.description: viscosity_cP with the 150 cP spec floor. Dropping below 150 => under-cook => verdict HOLD/REJECTED.

targets.sql: SELECT _wstart AS ts, AVG(value) AS viscosity_cP FROM idp.telemetry WHERE topic = 'DairyWorks/Vla/Cook/cook-unit-01/Status/viscosity_cP' AND ts >= $from AND ts <= $to INTERVAL($interval) FILL(PREV)
SELECT _wstart AS ts, MAX(value) AS packs_total FROM idp.telemetry WHERE topic = 'DairyWorks/Vla/Filling/filler-01/Status/packs_total' AND ts >= $from AND ts <= $to INTERVAL($interval) FILL(PREV)
SELECT _wstart AS ts, MAX(value) AS reject_count FROM idp.telemetry WHERE topic = 'DairyWorks/Vla/Filling/filler-01/Status/reject_count' AND ts >= $from AND ts <= $to INTERVAL($interval) FILL(PREV)

panels.title: Batch events — line status changes
panels.description: String-valued status topics (state / batch_id / active_recipe) as an event stream, plus phase transitions from the mixing tank.

targets.sql: SELECT ts, topic, valuestr FROM idp.telemetry WHERE topic LIKE 'DairyWorks/Vla/%' AND valuestr IS NOT NULL AND ts >= $from AND ts <= $to ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 200
